remarks: Welcome to this beautifully remodeled, turnkey second-floor condo offering modern updates, abundant storage, and an unbeatable location! A charming foyer welcomes you before leading upstairs to the bright, open-concept main living area. The spacious living and dining rooms flow seamlessly together and feature a slider to a private deck overlooking peaceful natural surroundings-the perfect spot to relax and unwind. The stunning, updated kitchen is designed for both style and function, featuring granite countertops, stainless steel appliances, ample cabinetry, and a convenient breakfast window opening to the dining room, making entertaining effortless. Upstairs, you'll find two generously sized bedrooms connected by an updated Jack-and-Jill bathroom with oversized tub and dual vanity. The primary bedroom features spacious walk-in closets, while a conveniently located laundry closet with a side-by-side washer and dryer adds everyday convenience. Thoughtfully updated throughout, this home offers countless improvements (see additional remarks for the complete list). With nothing left to do but move right in, you'll love the comfort, style, and low-maintenance living this exceptional condo provides. Don't miss this incredible opportunity!
